dialogue_tree.greeting: Welcome aboard! I can offer you {passage} to Vastarya. Where would you like to go?

name.text: I am the Captain. I sail between the great cities.

job.text: I transport adventurers between cities. Ask me for {passage} if you need a ride.

passage.text: I can take you to {Vastarya} for 100 gold. Where shall it be?

Vastarya.text: Vastarya it is! That will be 100 gold. Shall I set sail? Say {yes} or {no}.

yes.text: Hold tight! Off we go to Vastarya!

no.text: Maybe another time then. I can still offer {passage} if you change your mind.
